MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORP., Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production And That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted;Sanctions

OFF CALENDAR DISCOVERY MATTER.(302/REQ/JU)BELDON YEE # 2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Continued To Feb-10-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly for a default prove-up hearing in Dept. 218. Com. Sue Kaplan; Clerks R. Edwards/M. Chin; CRS Tony Vaughn/Mitch Lyons; Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff who was not present.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendants: Amirali Gilani individually and dba Terrell's One Hour Cleaner as follows:
Principal $61,547.70
Interest $3,068.52
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $342.50
for a total of $67,458.72

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2004 Continued To Dec-30-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
